name: Aurora
tagline: Mesh gradient (4-blob aurora) + grainy noise + 3-stop linear brand · 2026 gradient renaissance

color._canvas: Near-pure black dark mode (v16 lineage). Light mode in body.light.
color._aurora: The 4-color mesh palette — each anchors a quadrant of the hero band
color._gradient: Two flavors — linear 3-stop for chips/buttons, mesh 4-blob for heroes
color.gradientMesh: radial @ (18% 20%, violet) + radial @ (82% 28%, cyan) + radial @ (50% 82%, magenta) + radial @ (92% 92%, warmPink)
color._semantic: Tuned for both dark + light modes

noise._note: SVG feTurbulence overlay at 0.18 opacity, multiply blend in light mode, overlay in dark. The 'grainy aurora' 2026 trend.

font.mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace
